title: Biological Activities Working Group
content: Biological Activities Working Group Research Focus The Biological Activities Working Group carries out research on all kinds of biological sciences including biochemistry, molecular biology, microbiology, ecology, cytology, histology, physiology and genetics, encouraging projects, preparing publications and presentations.
